timing.comment: Timing parameters for intersection maneuvers (in seconds)

forward_clear_time.description: How long to creep forward over the red line before starting the turn

exit_timeout.description: Maximum seconds to drive forward after a turn while searching for lane lines

turn_time_forward.description: Seconds to drive straight forward through a forward intersection (no turn)

turn_time_left.description: Seconds to rotate left at an intersection

turn_time_right.description: Seconds to rotate right at an intersection

turn_time_turnaround.description: Seconds to rotate for a U-turn (turnaround)

motor_bias.description: Bias applied to compensate for motor differences

turn_bias_low.description: Lower wheel speed multiplier during turns

turn_bias_high.description: Higher wheel speed multiplier during turns

creep_speed.description: Speed while slowly driving over the red stop line before turning

exit_speed.description: Speed when driving forward after a turn, searching for lane markings

turn_speed.description: Speed of each wheel during a left/right rotation at an intersection

lane_following.comment: PID control and lane servoing parameters
lane_following.description: yellow_target and white_target are the normalized lane position targets (0.0 = left, 1.0 = right)

red_line_detection.comment: Red line detection parameters for intersection detection
red_line_detection.description: Parameters for detecting red stop lines at intersections. Two H ranges are used to handle red hue wrapping.

apriltag.description: apriltag_enabled: Enable AprilTag detection. apriltag_interval: Process every Nth frame. apriltag_min_area: Minimum area (pixels^2) to consider valid. apriltag_stop: Stop robot when AprilTag is visible. apriltag_stop_area: Minimum area (pixels^2) to trigger stop (0 = any detected tag).

object_detection.comment: Object detection parameters for obstacle avoidance
object_detection.description: obstacle_classes: List of class IDs that trigger stopping (0=duckie, 1=truck). obstacle_min_area: Minimum bbox area in pixels to consider. obstacle_zone_y: Bottom edge must reach below this Y fraction. obstacle_zone_x: Horizontal band [left, right] fractions for valid detections.

hsv_calibration.comment: HSV color ranges for lane line detection

yellow.description: HSV range for detecting yellow lane lines

white.description: HSV range for detecting white lane lines

hsv_calibration.description: HSV (Hue, Saturation, Value) color ranges for detecting yellow and white lane markings. Adjust these values based on lighting conditions.

navigation.comment: Navigation state - current start and goal positions
navigation.description: Start node, starting direction (N/E/S/W), and goal node for navigation
